name: Hot Rye's
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the bacon and crumble it.
2. Stir together the cheese, bacon, olives, green onion, Worcestershire sauce, and mayonnaise until well blended.
3. If necessary, add more mayonnaise to achieve a spreading consistency.
4. Spread the mixture onto the rye bread slices.
5. Bake in an oven at 350°F until hot.
